_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0-for-33 base rate on ±2+ point moves makes HOLD the statistically dominant call — the coil has not broken and neither brain provides a confirmed breaker signal, so calling a direction here would be a low-odds guess against the established pattern.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD/Disbelief next; narrative implies directional upside. The analyst's coil framework overrides the narrative's bullish analog given the structural divergences on ETF flows and VIX.
next_move.confirmed_if: VIX drops below 14 and funding stays below 0.002% with BTC holding $64k — coil resolves risk-on, leg up to Disbelief/Hope
next_move.invalidated_if: Funding spikes above 0.003% with BTC dom fading further while price stalls — speculative excess builds, triggering pullback toward Anxiety
